Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.introBody:
Welcome to I ❤️ NDB (Nouadhibou). We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal information is handled in a safe and responsible manner. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
By creating an account and using I ❤️ NDB, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
Privacy.dataBody: When you create an account and use our platform, we collect the following types of information:
dataList: Account Information: Your name, email address, and password when you register.
Profile Information: Your display name, bio, profile picture, cover photo, city, and any other details you choose to add.
Posts and Comments: Content you publish on the feed, including text, links, and reactions.
Memories: Stories, photos, and historical content you contribute to the memory archive.
Ideas: Suggestions and proposals you submit to improve the city.
Graatek Items: Items you list to share with the community.
Media: Images and videos you upload to the platform.
Cookies and Session Data: Technical data collected through cookies and similar technologies.
Privacy.accountsBody: When you create an account on I ❤️ NDB, we collect your name and email address. You may optionally provide additional profile information such as a bio, profile picture, and city. Your profile is visible to other community members. You can control what information is displayed by editing your profile settings at any time.
Privacy.contentBody: Any content you post on the platform — including feed posts, memories, ideas, comments, and Graatek listings — is stored on our servers and may be visible to other users according to your privacy settings and the nature of the feature. We retain this content to provide our services and maintain the community archive. You can delete your content at any time, and we will remove it from public view.
Privacy.mediaBody: Images and videos you upload are stored securely on our servers. We use these media files only to display them on the platform as you intend. We do not use your uploaded media for any purpose other than providing our services. You may delete any media you have uploaded at any time through the platform interface.
Privacy.cookiesBody: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to maintain your session, remember your preferences, and improve your experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Essential cookies are required for the platform to function properly. Analytics cookies help us understand how the platform is used so we can improve it.
Privacy.rightsBody:
You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time. You can:
- Edit your profile information through the platform settings.
- Delete your posts, memories, ideas, and Graatek items individually.
- Request full account deletion by contacting the platform administrators.
- Withdraw consent for data processing where applicable.
- Export your data by contacting us.
We will respond to any data request within a reasonable timeframe.
Privacy.contactBody: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact the platform administrators through the platform's contact channels or by reaching out to the community management team.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.introBody: Welcome to I ❤️ NDB. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use the platform. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and contributors of the I ❤️ NDB community platform.
Terms.rulesBody: To maintain a welcoming and constructive community, all users must follow these rules:
rulesList: Treat all community members with respect and dignity.
Share content that is accurate, constructive, and relevant to the community.
Use the platform in good faith and for its intended purposes.
Protect your account credentials and notify administrators of any unauthorized use.
Follow all applicable local and international laws when using the platform.
Terms.responsibilitiesBody: As a user of I ❤️ NDB, you are responsible for:
responsibilitiesList: The accuracy of the information you provide in your profile and posts.
Ensuring that any content you upload does not violate the rights of others.
Maintaining the confidentiality of your account password.
Reporting any violations of these terms to the platform administrators.
Complying with any additional guidelines posted for specific features or campaigns.
Terms.prohibitedBody: The following types of content are strictly prohibited on I ❤️ NDB:
prohibitedList: Hate speech, harassment, bullying, or discriminatory content.
Explicit, violent, or sexually explicit material.
Spam, misleading information, or fake news.
Content that infringes on the intellectual property rights of others.
Content promoting illegal activities or substances.
Malicious code, phishing attempts, or content that compromises platform security.
Impersonation of other users, public figures, or organizations.
Terms.moderationBody: I ❤️ NDB reserves the right to review, moderate, and remove any content that violates these terms or is deemed inappropriate for the community. Moderators and administrators may take action without prior notice when necessary to protect the community. We strive to apply moderation consistently and fairly. If you believe content has been removed in error, you may contact the moderation team for review.
Terms.suspensionBody:
Violation of these terms may result in any of the following actions:
- Warning: A formal notice about the violation.
- Content Removal: Removal of specific content that violates the terms.
- Temporary Suspension: Limited access to the platform for a specified period.
- Permanent Ban: Complete removal of access to the platform.
- Account Deletion: Removal of the account and all associated data.
The severity of the action depends on the nature and frequency of the violation. Appeals may be submitted to the platform administrators.
Terms.limitationsBody: I ❤️ NDB is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the availability, reliability, or suitability of the platform for any particular purpose. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the platform at any time. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform.
Terms.contactBody: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact the platform administrators through the available communication channels.

DataDeletion.title: Data Deletion
DataDeletion.introBody: At I ❤️ NDB, we respect your right to control your data. This page explains how you can request the deletion of your data from our platform. We are committed to processing deletion requests promptly and transparently.
DataDeletion.noticeBody: Currently, account and data deletion is handled manually by platform administrators. You can request deletion by contacting the platform administrators directly. Self-service account deletion will be available in a future update.
DataDeletion.accountBody:
To delete your entire account and all associated data, please contact the platform administrators with your request. Include the email address associated with your account so we can verify your identity. Once verified, we will:
- Permanently delete your account.
- Remove your profile information.
- Anonymize or delete your posts, comments, and reactions.
- Remove your uploaded media files.
Please note that some content (such as comments on others' posts) may be anonymized rather than fully deleted to preserve community context.
DataDeletion.postsBody: You can delete individual posts directly from the platform interface. Navigate to the post you wish to delete and use the delete option. If you need to delete multiple posts or are unable to delete a post yourself, please contact the platform administrators for assistance.
DataDeletion.memoriesBody: Memories you have contributed can be deleted from the memory archive. Navigate to the memory you wish to delete and use the available options. If you need help deleting memories or wish to remove all your memory contributions, contact the platform administrators.
DataDeletion.ideasBody: Ideas you have submitted can be deleted through the platform interface. Please note that deleting an idea will also remove associated votes and comments. If you encounter any issues, reach out to the platform administrators.
DataDeletion.fadlaBody: Graatek items you have listed can be deleted from the Graatek section. Once deleted, the item will no longer be visible to other community members. For bulk deletion or assistance, please contact the platform administrators.
DataDeletion.contactBody: To request data deletion or ask any questions about this process, please contact the platform administrators through the platform's communication channels. We will respond to your request within a reasonable timeframe and confirm once the deletion has been completed.

yearly.title: Your Community Impact - {year}
yearly.thankYou: Thank you for making Nouadhibou stronger.

leaderboards.title: Separate leaderboards
leaderboards.description: There is no one global ranking. Each contribution type has its own recognition path.
leaderboards.separate: Separate recognition, not a global score.

meta.title: About the Platform
meta.description: The official presentation of I Love NDB: the community platform connecting citizens, ideas, memories, support, volunteering, and transparent impact in Nouadhibou.

hero.title: I Love NDB is Nouadhibou's digital community home.
hero.subtitle: A civic platform where citizens, associations, institutions, companies, volunteers, and donors can connect around useful action: sharing daily life, preserving memory, supporting campaigns, exchanging resources, building ideas, and measuring community impact transparently.

visual.live: One city, many ways to contribute

story.title: Built from love for Nouadhibou, designed for real coordination.
paragraphs: I Love NDB was created because a city grows stronger when people can see each other, help each other, and organize around shared priorities.

Nouadhibou has fishermen, students, teachers, entrepreneurs, families, volunteers, elders, health workers, craftsmen, and community leaders. The platform gives those voices one trusted digital place to meet, remember, propose, contribute, and act.
This is more than a social feed. It is a community infrastructure layer for local trust, transparent support, heritage preservation, and future civic innovation.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: A connected Nouadhibou where every citizen can participate in building a safer, cleaner, more generous, more creative, and more informed city.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To provide a trusted digital platform that turns community energy into visible action: ideas become projects, donations become verified support, memories become shared heritage, and contribution becomes recognized impact.

features.title: Everything the city needs to move together.
features.text: Each module solves a real community need while staying simple enough for daily use.

items.title: Community feed
items.text: Citizens share updates, questions, photos, comments, and local conversations that keep the city informed.

items.title: Graatek
items.text: A community sharing space where people can offer useful items, request help, and complete transparent exchanges.

items.title: Ideas
items.text: Residents propose improvements, gather supporters, accept participants, and coordinate through private idea group chats.

items.title: Memories
items.text: Stories, photos, places, traditions, and historical moments preserve Nouadhibou's living heritage.

items.title: Campaigns
items.text: Verified support campaigns let citizens contribute money, materials, or effort with clear progress and updates.

items.title: Volunteering
items.text: Open opportunities connect people with useful local action, from education to cleaning to health support.

items.title: Community Impact
items.text: Verified actions build a contribution passport that recognizes real donations, completed Graatek, completed ideas, and published memories.

items.title: Messaging
items.text: Private conversations and idea groups help people coordinate respectfully, quickly, and securely.

how.title: A simple path from intention to impact.
how.text: The platform is designed so anyone can participate without needing technical knowledge.

steps.title: Create or join
steps.text: A citizen joins the community, chooses a language, completes a profile, and starts following local activity.

steps.title: Participate
steps.text: They post, support an idea, request a Graatek item, save a memory, volunteer, or contribute to a verified campaign.

steps.title: Coordinate
steps.text: Discussions, private chats, accepted participants, and admin workflows help move from conversation to organized action.

steps.title: Verify
steps.text: Campaign payments, completed exchanges, accepted participation, and published memories are validated before they count as impact.

steps.title: Recognize
steps.text: The platform shows contribution history and community impact clearly, helping partners understand what is happening in the city.

impact.title: Transparent impact, not invented numbers.
impact.text: I Love NDB is moving toward production-grade measurement where public counters and dashboards reflect verified database activity only.
impact.note: These counters describe platform capabilities. Live dashboards use real data and show zero when data does not exist.

trust.title: Why institutions and citizens can trust I Love NDB.
trust.text: Trust is built into the product architecture, not added as decoration.

items.title: Transparent campaigns
items.text: Support campaigns show organizer identity, status, updates, payment verification, and final reports when completed.

items.title: Privacy by design
items.text: Private chats, participant permissions, and protected workflows keep sensitive coordination away from public view.

items.title: Verified impact
items.text: The platform avoids fake scores and only recognizes events that can be traced to real completed or verified actions.

items.title: Institution-ready
items.text: The structure supports NGOs, companies, universities, donors, and public institutions without losing community simplicity.

items.title: Multilingual access
items.text: Arabic, French, and English support make the platform easier to present across civic, educational, and partner contexts.

items.title: Future ready
items.text: The data model prepares for recommendations, trending content, and richer city services without changing the core community promise.

team.title: Built by Zidnni
team.text: Zidnni is the team behind I Love NDB: product, engineering, design, and community thinking focused on practical technology for Nouadhibou.

members.name: Zidnni
members.text: Responsible for product architecture, engineering, design systems, platform operations, and future AI readiness.

members.name: I Love NDB
members.text: The public identity that represents love for Nouadhibou, civic contribution, and trusted local collaboration.

partners.title: Designed for collaboration
partners.text: The platform can support many kinds of partners while keeping campaigns and community data transparent.

items.title: NGOs and associations
items.text: Coordinate campaigns, volunteer activity, education support, and field updates.

items.title: Public institutions
items.text: Understand local priorities and communicate trusted initiatives to citizens.

items.title: Universities and schools
items.text: Connect youth, preserve knowledge, and support educational participation.

items.title: Donors and companies
items.text: Contribute with visibility, verification, and clear reporting on community outcomes.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.text: Clear answers for citizens, partners, and institutions.

items.question: Is I Love NDB only a social networkA
items.answer: No. It includes social activity, but the platform is broader: ideas, memories, Graatek, campaigns, volunteering, private coordination, and impact tracking.

items.question: Can normal users create support campaignsA
items.answer: In the initial phase, only verified I Love NDB administrators create official campaigns. This protects trust and transparency.

items.question: How do donations workA
items.answer: Local payment methods can be submitted with transaction IDs and receipts. Admins verify donations before totals are updated.

items.question: How is privacy protectedA
items.answer: Only accepted participants can access idea group chats. Public users, pending users, and rejected participants cannot access private coordination spaces.

items.question: How does Community Impact workA
items.answer: Impact is based on verified events such as verified donations, completed Graatek exchanges, completed ideas, and approved memories. Empty data displays as zero.

contact.title: Start a conversation with I Love NDB
contact.text: Citizens, partners, NGOs, companies, and institutions can reach out to explore collaboration, support, or platform participation.

final.title: Help Nouadhibou become more connected, generous, and visible.
final.text: Whether you are a citizen, volunteer, donor, company, NGO, school, or public institution, I Love NDB gives you a trusted place to contribute to the city.
